D.language: drive, urgency, control, ownership, and decisive movement
D.pressure_pattern: moves fast, takes charge, and becomes forceful when the room feels uncertain
D.healthy_pattern: names the priority and directs action without overpowering the room
D.shadow_pattern: controls the room before trust has time to form

I.language: expression, social energy, morale, visibility, and emotional momentum
I.pressure_pattern: fills the room with energy, jokes, or performance when connection feels unstable
I.healthy_pattern: uses expression to invite clarity and shared movement
I.shadow_pattern: uses charm or noise to avoid the real pressure

S.language: stability, care, pacing, trust, routine, and relational safety
S.pressure_pattern: tries to stabilize everyone, delays disruption, and protects the room from sudden change
S.healthy_pattern: names what support is needed and keeps the group steady without disappearing
S.shadow_pattern: absorbs pressure quietly until resentment or withdrawal appears

C.language: precision, accuracy, structure, standards, and pattern recognition
C.pressure_pattern: slows the room down, checks details, and tightens standards when uncertainty rises
C.healthy_pattern: clarifies the next accurate step without freezing the room
C.shadow_pattern: over-checks the system until movement stalls
